Sri Lanka
The brand

Not outside because rejected.
Outside by choice.

Bāhirayek is a Sinhala word. It means outsider. Said of our founders as a reason to exclude. Worn as a badge instead.

They didn't need the room.

Bāhirayek
Every culture has a word for the person who doesn't fit.
In Sinhala, that word is Bāhirayek.
We made it a name.
Sri Lanka · Est. 2026
Proudly Apart
For those
who never
quite fit.
Not because they failed.
Because they chose another road.

An outsider. Someone beyond the accepted group, system, or expectation.
